message:
feat: add hive pin command and dashboard pin toggle (#99)

- hive pin <agent>: pins current CLI so governor won't change it
- /api/pin/:agent and /api/unpin/:agent endpoints in dashboard
- Pin toggle button (📌/🔓) on CLI row in agent cards
- Allows pinning without restarting the agent

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
